title: Mouse Gravity Field
description: Particles are attracted and repelled by the mouse, creating dynamic colorful gravitational patterns.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to attract particles. Click to repel them.
script: let particles=[];let attract=true;function setup(){createCanvas(window.innerWidth,window.innerHeight);colorMode(HSB,360,100,100,100);background(210,20,95);for(let i=0;i<300;i++)particles.push(new P())}function draw(){fill(210,20,95,10);noStroke();rect(0,0,width,height);particles.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.show()})}function mousePressed(){attract=!attract}class P{constructor(){this.pos=createVector(random(width),random(height));this.vel=p5.Vector.random2D();this.h=random(360)}update(){let m=createVector(mouseX,mouseY);let dir=p5.Vector.sub(m,this.pos);let d=dir.mag();dir.normalize();dir.mult(attract?0.4:-0.6);if(d<200)this.vel.add(dir);this.vel.limit(3);this.pos.add(this.vel)}show(){stroke(this.h,80,80,80);point(this.pos.x,this.pos.y)}}

title: Field Painter
description: A colorful flow field reacts to mouse movement, creating vibrant motion trails.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to influence flow direction and color shifts.

title: Elastic Grid Distortion
description: A colorful grid deforms elastically around the mouse like a soft surface.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to push and pull the grid.
script: let spacing=25;function setup(){createCanvas(600,600);colorMode(HSB,360,100,100)}function draw(){background(210,10,95);for(let x=0;x<=width;x+=spacing){for(let y=0;y<=height;y+=spacing){let d=dist(x,y,mouseX,mouseY);let offset=map(d,0,200,40,0,true);let angle=atan2(y-mouseY,x-mouseX);let nx=x+cos(angle)*offset;let ny=y+sin(angle)*offset;stroke((x+y)%360,70,80);point(nx,ny)}}}

title: Particle Brush Explosion
description: Clicking creates vibrant particle explosions with colorful fading trails.
howToInteract: Click anywhere to generate particle explosions.

title: Orbit Control System
description: Particles orbit around the mouse in colorful circular paths.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to reposition the orbital center.

title: Wave Distortion Field
description: A bright grid reacts with colorful wave distortions emanating from the mouse.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to generate waves.
script: let spacing=20;function setup(){createCanvas(700,300);colorMode(HSB,360,100,100)}function draw(){background(60,10,95);for(let x=0;x<width;x+=spacing){for(let y=0;y<height;y+=spacing){let d=dist(x,y,mouseX,mouseY);let offset=sin(d*0.05-frameCount*0.1)*15;stroke((d+frameCount)%360,80,80);point(x+offset,y+offset)}}}

title: Magnetic Lines
description: Colorful flowing lines bend and align toward the mouse like a dynamic magnetic field.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to influence line directions.

title: Colorful Repulsion Field
description: Bright particles scatter away from the mouse, leaving colorful trails on a light background.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to repel particles and create bursts of color.
script: let particles=[];function setup(){createCanvas(window.innerWidth,window.innerHeight);background(255);colorMode(HSB,360,100,100,100);for(let i=0;i<400;i++)particles.push(new P())}function draw(){fill(255,20);noStroke();rect(0,0,width,height);particles.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.show()})}class P{constructor(){this.pos=createVector(random(width),random(height));this.vel=p5.Vector.random2D();this.h=random(360)}update(){let m=createVector(mouseX,mouseY);let dir=p5.Vector.sub(this.pos,m);let d=dir.mag();if(d<150){dir.normalize().mult(0.5);this.vel.add(dir)}this.vel.limit(3);this.pos.add(this.vel)}show(){stroke(this.h,80,100,80);point(this.pos.x,this.pos.y)}}

title: Fullscreen Noise Waves
description: Soft colorful waves flow across the entire screen using animated noise fields.
howToInteract: Move the mouse vertically to control wave intensity.

title: Interactive Color Grid
description: A responsive grid that changes color and size based on proximity to the mouse.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to distort and recolor the grid.

title: Ribbon Trails
description: Smooth colorful ribbons follow the mouse creating fluid motion paths.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to draw flowing ribbons.

title: Dynamic Voronoi-like Cells
description: Cells expand and contract around moving points influenced by the mouse.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to shift the cell centers.
script: let pts=[];function setup(){createCanvas(600,400);pixelDensity(1);for(let i=0;i<20;i++){pts.push(createVector(random(width),random(height)))}}function draw(){background(250);loadPixels();for(let x=0;x<width;x++){for(let y=0;y<height;y++){let minD=999999,index=0;for(let i=0;i<pts.length;i++){let dx=x-pts[i].x,dy=y-pts[i].y,d=dx*dx+dy*dy;if(d<minD){minD=d;index=i}}let iPix=(x+y*width)*4;pixels[iPix]=(index*30)%255;pixels[iPix+1]=150;pixels[iPix+2]=200;pixels[iPix+3]=255}}updatePixels();pts.forEach(p=>{p.x+=map(mouseX,0,width,-1,1);p.y+=map(mouseY,0,height,-1,1)})}

title: Soft Body Cursor
description: A jelly-like blob follows the mouse with elastic deformation.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to stretch and deform the blob.

title: Interactive Light Rays
description: Light rays emanate from the mouse and bounce across the canvas.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to change the origin of the rays.

title: Bouncing Color Bands
description: Horizontal bands shift and bounce with color changes based on mouse position.
howToInteract: Move the mouse horizontally to shift wave phases.

title: 3D Orbit Grid
description: A rotating grid of points in 3D space creating a hypnotic orbital illusion.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to change rotation speed.

title: Depth Wave Field
description: A dynamic wave surface simulating depth using sine-based displacement.

title: Tunnel of Points
description: A 3D point tunnel giving the illusion of flying through space.
howToInteract: Move the mouse to steer the tunnel.

title: Color Sphere Cluster
description: Multiple spheres pulsate in 3D space with smooth color transitions.

title: Spiral Galaxy
description: Simulates a colorful spiral galaxy with thousands of orbiting stars.
script: let stars=[];function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight,WEBGL);for(let i=0;i<1000;i++){stars.push({r:random(50,400),angle:random(TWO_PI),speed:random(0.001,0.01),col:color(random(150,255),random(150,255),255)})}}function draw(){background(0);rotateY(frameCount*0.002);for(let s of stars){s.angle+=s.speed;let x=cos(s.angle)*s.r;let y=sin(s.angle)*s.r;push();translate(x,y,0);stroke(s.col);point(0,0);pop()}}

title: Voxel Mountains
description: 3D voxel-like mountains generated from Perlin noise.
script: let cols,rows;let scl=20;let w=600;let h=600;let terrain=[];function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight,WEBGL);cols=w/scl;rows=h/scl;for(let x=0;x<cols;x++){terrain[x]=[];for(let y=0;y<rows;y++){terrain[x][y]=0}}}function draw(){background(255);rotateX(PI/3);translate(-w/2,-h/2);let yoff=0;for(let y=0;y<rows;y++){let xoff=0;for(let x=0;x<cols;x++){terrain[x][y]=map(noise(xoff,yoff,frameCount*0.01),0,1,-50,150);xoff+=0.1}yoff+=0.1}for(let y=0;y<rows-1;y++){for(let x=0;x<cols-1;x++){stroke(0);noFill();push();translate(x*scl,y*scl,terrain[x][y]);box(scl,scl,terrain[x][y]);pop()}}}

title: Tunnel Grid Rainbow
description: A moving rainbow tunnel made from a grid of lines converging to a vanishing point.

title: Dynamic Sphere Mesh
description: A mesh of connected spheres oscillates creating a wavy surface effect.
script: let cols=20;let rows=20;let spacing=30;function setup(){createCanvas(800,600,WEBGL)}function draw(){background(0,20,40);rotateX(PI/4);rotateZ(frameCount*0.01);for(let x=0;x<cols;x++){for(let y=0;y<rows;y++){let z=sin(frameCount*0.02+x*0.5+y*0.5)*20;push();translate((x-cols/2)*spacing,(y-rows/2)*spacing,z);fill(100+155*sin(frameCount*0.02+x+y),200,255);noStroke();sphere(10);pop()}}}

title: Floating Cubes
description: Cubes float and rotate in 3D space with changing colors.

title: Kaleidoscope Sphere
description: A mirrored 3D sphere reflecting rotating colorful patterns.

title: Particle Orbit Rings
description: Particles orbit around multiple invisible rings in 3D space, changing colors over time.
script: let rings=[];function setup(){createCanvas(windowWidth,windowHeight,WEBGL);for(let i=0;i<5;i++){let ring=[];for(let j=0;j<100;j++){ring.push({angle:TWO_PI/100*j,r:50+50*i})}rings.push(ring)}}function draw(){background(255);rotateX(frameCount*0.01);rotateY(frameCount*0.01);for(let i=0;i<rings.length;i++){for(let p of rings[i]){p.angle+=0.01;let x=cos(p.angle)*p.r;let y=sin(p.angle)*p.r;push();translate(x,y,i*30-50);stroke(map(i,0,rings.length,50,255),200,255);point(0,0);pop()}}}

title: Expanding Hex Grid
description: Hexagonal cells expand and contract in a pulsating rhythm, creating a hypnotic spatial pattern.
script: let hexSize=20;function setup(){createCanvas(800,600)}function draw(){background(30);stroke(255);noFill();let t=millis()*0.002;for(let x=0;x<width+hexSize;x+=hexSize*1.5){for(let y=0;y<height+hexSize;y+=sqrt(3)*hexSize){let s=hexSize*(0.5+0.5*sin(t+(x+y)*0.01));drawHex(x,y,s)}}}function drawHex(x,y,s){beginShape();for(let i=0;i<6;i++){let a=PI/3*i;vertex(x+cos(a)*s,y+sin(a)*s)}endShape(CLOSE)}

title: Sinusoidal Grid Flow
description: A grid of points connected with lines that flow along a sine-based vector field, creating a smooth spatial motion.
script: let cols=25,rows=25;let spacing;function setup(){createCanvas(600,600);spacing=width/cols}function draw(){background(0);stroke(255);for(let i=0;i<cols;i++){for(let j=0;j<rows;j++){let x=i*spacing;let y=j*spacing;let angle=sin(i*0.3+frameCount*0.02)+cos(j*0.3+frameCount*0.02);let x2=x+20*cos(angle);let y2=y+20*sin(angle);line(x,y,x2,y2)}}}

title: 3D Cube Lattice
description: A 3D lattice of cubes rotating together to form a spatial grid, giving a sense of depth and structure.

title: Lorenz Attractor
description: A representation of the Lorenz system, a set of differential equations that describe chaotic flow in a 3D space.
